modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't write files to external hard drive on Windows 10

full_description_text: User has a new hard drive. They can't write files to it. This is happening on their work computer. They are using Windows 10 and macOS.
short_description: Can't write files to external hard drive on Windows 10
description: User has a new hard drive. They can't write files to it. This is happening on their work computer. They are using Windows 10 and macOS.
